title: plagiobothrys orthocarpus
intro: Plagiobothrys orthocarpus, also known as desert bluebells, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It is a perennial herb with blue to purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. Desert bluebells can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including coughs and colds.
